EmailTemplate.name: Expo Hotel Reminder
EmailTemplate.subject: Reminder to submit flight and hotel information (Hotel deadline 10th Jan)
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
尊敬的XX
您好！
提醒您尽快登录展会系统填报航班/酒店信息。 酒店信息提报截止日期为1月10日，请您按期提报，以免酒店资源紧张无法及时为您预留房间。 航班及接送机信息提报截止日期为1月15日，请您提前安排好行程。 2025年度营销会议将于2025年1月20-21日举行，邮件末附会议统一日程安排以参考。
登陆遇到问题请咨询崔杰 cuijie3@hisense.com
Dear XX
您好！
This is a friendly reminder for you to log in to the Hisense Expo System to fill in your flight and hotel information.
The deadline for submitting hotel information is January 10th, please submit your information in time, in case hotel room resources are tight and cannot reserve your room in time. The deadline for submitting flight, pick-up and drop-off information is January 15th, please arrange your itinerary in advance. The 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting will be held from January 20 to 21, 2025. You can also check the meeting schedule at the bottom of the email for reference.
If you encounter any problems during submitting, please contact Mars Cui at cuijie3@hisense.com
